subject: Changes for populating ReactJS component library
commit_message:
Changes for populating ReactJS component library

Modification of Maven pom.xml to rollup the source files and
publish the library
Introduction of OnapConstants.js to provide single focus for defining
constants shared across multiple components; resolves currrent circular
dependency between LoopUI.js and MenuBar.js
Corrected LoopSvg.js to import withRoute from react-router-dom instead
of react-router

Issue-ID: CLAMP-586
Change-Id: If657c645ac90f1d6305464851d2943b666f0aa9e
Signed-off-by: TedHumphrey <Thomas.Humphrey@att.com>

entries.message:

The changes required to address the problem result in a new directory structure. Much cleaner to abandon than re-design.
